news.summary: Oil and gas are not just fuel, they are raw materials for thousands of products, including fertilisers used in farming.

news.headline: Could Trump ‘take over’ the Strait of Hormuz as oil prices rise?
news.summary: Oil prices spiked after shipments through the Strait of Hormuz were disrupted amid the Iran war.
